reasoning: Provide a concise, neutral summary of the incident, capturing the key facts: fatal accident during training, person involved, location, context (World Para Athletics Championships), ongoing investigations, and notable reactions.
output: Abdullah Hayayei, a 36-year-old UAE Paralympic thrower, died after a throwing cage at Newham Leisure Centre collapsed on his head during training ahead of the London World Para Athletics Championships. Police and the Health and Safety Executive are investigating the incident; two of his personal coaches were present but not involved. A moment of silence will be held at the opening ceremony in his memory.
